name: Hearty Green Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cannelini beans; rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, combine spinach, watercress, parsley, and 1/4 cup of water. Bring to a boil, breaking up the spinach with a fork.
2. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes. Drain the greens and press any remaining liquid out with a spatula. Set greens and liquid aside.
3. In the same Dutch oven, stir together the flour and oil until smooth. Cook over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Reduce heat to medium. Cook and stir about 10 more minutes or until reddish-brown.
5. Add onions, green pepper, and celery. Cook and stir over medium heat for 5 to 10 minutes or until very tender.
6. Add enough water to the reserved liquid to make 2-1/2 cups. Stir in the liquid, cooked greens, salt, red pepper, and black pepper into the onion mixture. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
7. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes. Add broccoli and parsnips or rutabaga. Cover and simmer about 10 more minutes or until tender.
8. Stir in beans; heat through. To serve, place rice in individual dishes. Ladle gumbo over the rice.
